diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support, this is Priya. How can I help?
[Caller] Hi Priya. I play on PSN, my account is linked to PlayStation, and I lost access to my HoYoverse email completely. I can still log into PSN though. Is there any way to recover through that?
[Agent] Yes, absolutely — your linked platform is another verified identity path. Let's try that route. Could you share the PSN ID you use for Genshin?
[Caller] MarcusChen underscore PS. No wait, it's MarcusChen_PS with an underscore.
[Agent] Got it — MarcusChen_PS. One moment. Confirmed — I see the link to UID 603245891, Marcus Chen, on the America server. That's a full identity match via your PlayStation credential. Quick courtesy check — what's the last 5-star character you pulled, just so we're extra sure?
[Caller] Neuvillette.
[Agent] Perfect — that matches our records. I'll now initiate a recovery to replace your HoYoverse email. Because we have verified platform credentials plus a knowledge-based match, this is our fastest-track recovery — you'll have access within about two hours. What new email would you like on file?
[Caller] marcus.chen.new at email dot com.
[Agent] Let me read that back — marcus dot chen dot new at email dot com. Correct?
[Caller] Yes, that's right.
[Agent] Queued. Case ID REC9F2D8A3B. You'll get an email at the new address with a secure link to set a password and re-enable login. The link is valid for 24 hours. While we're here — I'd really recommend linking a backup email or an authenticator app so you never end up in this spot again. Want me to send you a quick setup guide?
[Caller] Yes please. And thank you for actually solving this, I was worried I'd lost everything.
[Agent] No losses today — your progress, your characters, your 1,820 dollars of lifetime top-ups, all safe. Set-up guide sent. Anything else?
[Caller] No, that's perfect. Thanks again, Priya.
[Agent] You're welcome, Marcus. Enjoy Fontaine!
